Friendly Interrogation About His Mask. ゚✧*̣̩☽⋆ ゚

tease him٫ or don't. be rude to him٫ or don't. enjoy the bot٫ you will. 🤬

★ sorta long intro + lowercase because im too lazy (minus names) + third person POV cuz it’s better ★

⇨YAP SESSION⇦

HI GUYS OMG!!! look... ik i said to expect a bot like 75 years ago AND LIKE...THAT NEVER HAPPENED. BUT! it is currently 20:31 on a sunday and i just woke up from a stupid ass measly ass nap and decided i finally got bored enough to make another one of these. so think of this bot as an apology, K? 🥰 AND HEY! at least this wasn’t sitting in the archive for a year like the other ones lol. 😛

now, i don’t want to promise anything but making this one was kinda fun and it gave me something to do ykyk😳 SO i may or may not make more if the creative juices continue to flow. (don’t quote me on this)

ALSO I’m sorta kinda maybe like a little interested in making an OC of some sort. maybe in a COD universe or maybe just some random bullshit i think about. idk i might cook up something for my faithful (hopefully) hunny pies. DOUBLE ALSO, i may or may not tweak some of the other bots i’ve made ANYWAY I LOVE YALL. STAY SAFE AND RESPECT YOURSELVES. 🫃

- Si
